report.summary: Cycle v4: no new commits since Mar 25 batch deploy; 308 uncommitted files (31 modified, 277 untracked) — up from 286 as new OG images and learn page edits accumulated; 145 TS errors unchanged across same 6 files; all 6 API routes healthy; deploy still pending git push.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Page Existence Audit: 582 published slugs, 477 have page.tsx (81.9%), 105 missing — unchanged from last cycle
TypeScript: 145 errors across same 6 files (structured-data.examples.ts + 5 learn guide pages) — no new regressions introduced

12 learn page files modified since last commit (bitcoin-safe-haven, bitgo-ipo, congressional-tokenization, crypto-wallet-security, institutional-crypto-adoption, katana-perps, layer-3-chains, leveraged-tokens, lido-v3-stvaults, onchain-order-book, tokenized-funds, [slug]/page.tsx)
5 OG SVG images modified (morpho, privacy-coins, smart-wallets, ton-blockchain, unichain) — visual updates only
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors:true remains set in next.config.ts — TS errors won't block Vercel deploy but represent tech debt

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), trending (300s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL), defi-yields (300s TTL)
Cache headers correct: all routes use s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate pattern
Rate limiter module present with token-bucket algorithm and per-route config
No API route code changes since last cycle — zero regression risk
Live upstream connectivity (CoinGecko/DefiLlama) cannot be verified from sandbox — requires production check

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — batch deploy of 170+ pages, still live on Vercel
308 uncommitted files in working tree (31 modified + 277 untracked) — up from 286 in v3 cycle
New untracked assets: ~50 OG SVG images, multiple learn guide pages, report files, community drafts
Middleware has 54 hardcoded pillar pages — decoupled from published-pages.ts (582 entries), intentional tiered indexing
Security headers configured: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, immutable static cache
Deploy remains blocked pending git commit+push to trigger Vercel auto-deploy

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta from v3: 22 net new files added to working tree (308 vs 286), primarily OG images and learn page refinements
No new pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES since v3 — publish queue unchanged
Carry-over (P0): Git commit + push of 308 uncommitted files to trigger Vercel deploy — blocked for 14+ cycles
Carry-over (P1): 105 published slugs without page.tsx — risk of 404s on indexed URLs
Carry-over (P2): 145 TS errors in 6 files — non-blocking but accumulating tech debt
Blocker for Jefe: Deploy decision needed — 308 files ready but require manual git push to go live
